ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
inst✝⁵ : NormedAddCommGroup E
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
P : Measure Ω
X : ι → Ω → E
inst✝⁴ : LinearOrder ι
𝓕 : Filtration ι mΩ
inst✝³ : OrderBot ι
inst✝² : TopologicalSpace ι
inst✝¹ : OrderTopology ι
inst✝ : MeasurableSpace ι
hX1 : @ProbabilityTheory.HasLocallyIntegrableSup ι Ω E inst✝⁵ mΩ inst✝⁴ inst✝³ inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ X 𝓕 P
hX2 : Adapted 𝓕 X
h𝓕 : 𝓕.IsRightContinuous
⊢ Locally
    (fun x =>
      @ProbabilityTheory.ClassDL ι Ω E inst✝⁵ mΩ instDistribLatticeOfLinearOrder.toSemilatticeInf.toPreorder ⋯ inst✝ x 𝓕
        P)
    𝓕 X P

refine fun t ↦ ?_

    refine uniformIntegrable_of_dominated this (fun T => ?_) (fun T => ⟨T, ?_⟩)

      exact iSup₂_mono (fun u _ => iSup₂_le_of_le (le_refl _) (norm_nonneg _))

    exact ⟨τ, fun ω => norm_nonneg _⟩

refine hX1.imp fun t hXt ↦ ?_
  have h_prog : ProgMeasurable 𝓕 X := hX2.progMeasurable_of_rightContinuous h𝓕
  refine ⟨h_prog, fun s ↦ ?_⟩
  have hs : s ≤ t ∨ t < s := le_total s t
  cases' hs with hst hts
  · exact uniformIntegrable_of_dominated'
      (hXt.2 s)
      (fun σ ↦ (stronglyMeasurable_stoppedValue_of_le h_prog σ.2.1 σ.2.2).aestronglyMeasurable)
      (fun σ ω ↦ norm_stoppedValue_le_sup σ.2.2 ω)
  · have hXs : Integrable (fun ω ↦ ⨆ u ≤ s, ‖X u ω‖ₑ) P := hXt.2 s
    exact uniformIntegrable_of_dominated'
      hXs
      (fun σ ↦ (stronglyMeasurable_stoppedValue_of_le h_prog σ.2.1 σ.2.2).aestronglyMeasurable)
      (fun σ ω ↦ norm_stoppedValue_le_sup σ.2.2 ω)

refine hX1.elim fun t ht => ?_
  have h_prog : ProgMeasurable 𝓕 X := hX2.progMeasurable_of_rightContinuous h𝓕
  refine ⟨⟨h_prog, fun s => ?_⟩, le_rfl⟩
  have hs : s ≤ t ∨ t ≤ s := le_total s t
  cases' hs with hst hts
  · have h_sup : Integrable (fun ω ↦ ⨆ u ≤ s, ‖X u ω‖ₑ) P :=
      (hX1.mem_local_iff.mp ht).2 s
    exact uniformIntegrable_of_dominated' h_sup
      (fun T => (stronglyMeasurable_stoppedValue_of_le h_prog T.2.1 T.2.2).aestronglyMeasurable)
      (fun T ω => norm_stoppedValue_le_sup T.2.2 ω)
  · have h_sup : Integrable (fun ω ↦ ⨆ u ≤ t, ‖X u ω‖ₑ) P :=
      (hX1.mem_local_iff.mp ht).2 t
    refine uniformIntegrable_of_dominated' h_sup
      (fun T => (stronglyMeasurable_stoppedValue_of_le h_prog T.2.1 T.2.2).aestronglyMeasurable)
      (fun T ω => le_trans (norm_stoppedValue_le_sup T.2.2 ω) (iSup₂_mono fun u _ => iSup₂_le_of_le hts))

refine fun t ↦ ?_
  have h_prog : ProgMeasurable 𝓕 X := hX2.progMeasurable_of_rightContinuous
    (fun ω ↦ rightContinuous_of_adapted_isRightContinuous hX2 h𝓕 ω)
  refine ⟨h_prog, fun s ↦ ?_⟩
  have hs : s ≤ t ∨ t < s := le_total s t
  cases' hs with hst hts
  · exact (hX1 s).2 s
  · have := (hX1 t).2 t
    refine uniformIntegrable_of_dominated this (fun σ ↦ ?_) (fun σ ↦ ?_)
    · exact ((stronglyMeasurable_stoppedValue_of_le h_prog σ.2.1 σ.2.2).mono
        (𝓕.le' t)).aestronglyMeasurable
    · refine ⟨⟨t, σ.2.1, fun ω ↦ le_trans (σ.2.2 ω) (le_of_lt hts)⟩, ?_⟩
      filter_upwards with ω
      simp only [stoppedValue]
      have : σ.1 ω ≤ t := le_trans (σ.2.2 ω) (le_of_lt hts)
      rw [WithTop.untopA_eq_untop (ne_of_lt (lt_of_le_of_lt this (WithTop.coe_lt_top t)))]
      exact le_rfl

refine hX1.imp fun t hX_t ↦ ?_
  have h_prog : ProgMeasurable 𝓕 X := hX2.progMeasurable_of_rightContinuous h𝓕
  refine ⟨h_prog, fun s ↦ ?_⟩
  have : ∀ u ≤ s, Integrable (fun ω ↦ ⨆ v ≤ u, ‖X v ω‖ₑ) P := fun u hu ↦ hX_t u
  exact UniformIntegrable.of_sup_norm (this s le_rfl) (h_prog s)

refine hX1.imp fun t hX_t ↦ ?_
  have h_prog : ProgMeasurable 𝓕 X := hX2.progMeasurable_of_rightContinuous h𝓕
  refine ⟨h_prog, fun s ↦ ?_⟩
  have h_int : Integrable (fun ω ↦ ⨆ u ≤ s, ‖X u ω‖ₑ) P := hX_t s
  refine UniformIntegrable.of_dominated_norm h_int ?_
  intro τ
  exact ((stronglyMeasurable_stoppedValue_of_le h_prog τ.2.1 τ.2.2).mono (𝓕.le' s)).aestronglyMeasurable

refine hX1.imp ?_
  intro t hXt
  have h_prog : ProgMeasurable 𝓕 X := hX2.progMeasurable_of_rightContinuous h𝓕
  refine ⟨h_prog, fun s => ?_⟩
  have h_sup : Integrable (fun ω ↦ ⨆ u ≤ s, ‖X u ω‖ₑ) P := hXt s
  have h_dom : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, ∀ u ≤ s, ‖X u ω‖ ≤ ⨆ v ≤ s, ‖X v ω‖ := by
    filter_upwards
    intro ω u hu
    exact le_iSup₂_of_le u (le_refl _) hu
  refine uniformIntegrable_of_dominated' h_sup.aestronglyMeasurable ?_ ?_
  · intro T
    exact ((stronglyMeasurable_stoppedValue_of_le h_prog T.2.1 T.2.2).mono
      (𝓕.le' s)).aestronglyMeasurable
  · intro T
    filter_upwards [h_dom] with ω hω
    calc ‖stoppedValue X T.1 ω‖
        = ‖X (T.1 ω).untopA ω‖ := by simp [stoppedValue]
      _ ≤ ⨆ u ≤ s, ‖X u ω‖ := hω (T.1 ω).untopA (T.2.2 ω)

refine fun t ↦ ?_
  have h_prog : ProgMeasurable 𝓕 X := hX2.progMeasurable_of_rightContinuous h𝓕
  refine ⟨h_prog, fun s ↦ ?_⟩
  have h_int : Integrable (fun ω ↦ ⨆ u ≤ s, ‖X u ω‖ₑ) P := (hX1 s).2
  have h_sm : StronglyMeasurable (fun p : ι × Ω ↦ ⨆ u ≤ p.1, ‖X u p.2‖ₑ) := (hX1 s).1
  refine uniformIntegrable_of_dominated' ?_ (fun T => ?_) (fun T => ?_)
  · exact h_int.uniformIntegrable
  · exact ((stronglyMeasurable_stoppedValue_of_le h_prog T.2.1 T.2.2).mono (𝓕.le' s)).aestronglyMeasurable
  · filter_upwards with ω
    simp only [stoppedValue]
    exact le_iSup₂_of_le _ (T.2.2 ω) (le_refl _)
